回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 財務管理(二) (Financial Management II)	開課班級 : 企管二乙	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 王興國	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
Financial management offers coverage of the major topical areas for introductory-level undergraduate courses. Our focus in on financial decision making related the corporation’s choice of which investments to make or how to raise the capital required to fund an investment. The aim of this course is to provide a though, applied and practical introduction to the discipline and practice of financial management. 


2.教學綱要
The purpose of this course is to improve your financial theories and practices so you are able to assess the financial performance of an organization. This course will also introduce you to key concepts for managing finances such as the financial statements, capital budgeting, how enterprises finance their capital expenditure, stock valuation and the dividend policy. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Fundamentals of Corporate Finance　
出版日期 : 2019年 月 
作者 : Ross, Westerfield, & Jordan　出版社 : 華泰　版本 : 12 


4.參考書
1	書名 : 財務管理　出版日期 : 2019年 11月 
作者 : 王明昌譯　出版社 : 華泰文化　版本 : 12 

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Semi-exam: 30%; 2. Financial exam:30%; 3. Final proposal presentation 40%. 
 
All the contents will be taught in English.
